Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Cotton: N: Yellowing of older leaves; Mg: Purplish red leaves with green veins; Zn: Small leaves with bronzing
Sugarcane: N: Pale green leaves; P: Stunted, narrow leaves; Fe: Interveinal chlorosis (white stripes)
Turmeric: N: Pale yellow leaves; P: Dark green, reduced size; Fe: Chlorosis of young leaves
Ginger: N: Yellowing; P: Purple-tinged leaves; Fe: Severe chlorosis
Garlic: N: Pale leaves, poor bulbing; S: Yellowing of young leaves
Chilli: N: Pale yellow leaves; K: Leaf margin scorching; Zn: Narrow, mottled leaves
